case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS SNYDER ADAM E.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,114.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT SNYDER ADAM E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SNYDER ADAM E. $495.00 PRINCIPAL, $42.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $537.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SNYDER ADAM E.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SNYDER ADAM E.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SNYDER ADAM E.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $290.13 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT SNYDER ADAM E.
